rights_and_claims.notes: Uses registered Paper Architecture theme assets from the local music registry. Public release remains blocked until YouTube claim/status checks are complete.

pronunciation_repair.issue_reported_by_user: At active proof 00:03:52, duplicate was pronounced as noun dupli-cut; context requires verb dupli-cate.
pronunciation_repair.original_script_sentence: Why duplicate safety with expensive hardware when the code was already proven?
pronunciation_repair.caption_text_policy: captions_and_locked_script_text_remain_duplicate; only TTS render text used phonetic dupli-kate spelling
